title: VPC Network Architecture Design & Implementation
description: Design and implement VPC with public/private subnets across 3 AZs, NAT Gateways, and Internet Gateways using Terraform modules.
sprint_goal: Establish Cloud Infrastructure & Core Security Foundation
acceptance_criteria: VPC created; Subnets configured; Terraform apply succeeds
definition_of_done: Terraform plan applied; Network reachability verified

title: EKS Control Plane & Node Group Configuration
description: Provision EKS Control Plane, OIDC provider, and Managed Node Groups (On-Demand & Spot) using Terraform.
sprint_goal: Establish Cloud Infrastructure & Core Security Foundation
acceptance_criteria: Cluster Active 1.29+; Nodes Ready; OIDC configured
definition_of_done: kubectl get nodes returns Ready status

title: RDS Instance Provisioning
description: Configure RDS PostgreSQL 15+ instance with multi-AZ, encryption at rest, and automated backups using Terraform.
sprint_goal: Establish Cloud Infrastructure & Core Security Foundation
acceptance_criteria: RDS available; Connectivity from VPC; Encryption enabled

title: JWT Strategy Implementation
description: Implement `passport-jwt` strategy to validate Cognito Access Tokens using JWKS.
sprint_goal: Establish Cloud Infrastructure & Core Security Foundation
acceptance_criteria: Valid tokens accepted; Invalid tokens rejected (401)
definition_of_done: Unit tests mocking Cognito tokens passing

title: RBAC Guard & Decorator Implementation
description: Create `@Roles()` decorator and Guard to check user roles against required roles for routes.
sprint_goal: Establish Cloud Infrastructure & Core Security Foundation
acceptance_criteria: Guard blocks missing roles (403); Allows valid roles
definition_of_done: Integration tests with different role combinations passing

title: Wise API Client Wrapper
description: Implement typed client for Wise API (Transfer, Profile, Quote endpoints). Handle authentication and error mapping.
sprint_goal: Establish Cloud Infrastructure & Core Security Foundation
acceptance_criteria: Create quote; Create transfer; Error handling
definition_of_done: Integration tests against Wise Sandbox passing

title: Worker Service Scaffold & SQS Consumer
description: Setup Python/Node worker service, configure SQS consumer loop with error handling and DLQ support.
sprint_goal: Establish Cloud Infrastructure & Core Security Foundation
acceptance_criteria: Consumes messages; ACKs success; NACKs failure

title: Document Text Extraction (OCR/Parsing)
description: Implement text extraction logic for PDF and DOCX files using libraries (e.g., PyPDF2, python-docx).
sprint_goal: Establish Cloud Infrastructure & Core Security Foundation
acceptance_criteria: Extracts text from PDF/DOCX; Handles large files
definition_of_done: Unit tests with sample documents passing

title: Cluster Autoscaler & Metrics Server Deployment
description: Deploy Metrics Server and Cluster Autoscaler via Helm using Terraform helm_release resource.
sprint_goal: Establish Cloud Infrastructure & Core Security Foundation
definition_of_done: Manual scaling test triggers node addition

title: Database Parameter Group & pgvector Activation
description: Configure custom parameter group to preload libraries and create initialization script to enable `pgvector` extension.
sprint_goal: Establish Cloud Infrastructure & Core Security Foundation
definition_of_done: SQL query creating vector column succeeds

title: MFA Setup Endpoint (Associate Token)
description: Implement endpoint calling `AssociateSoftwareToken` to start MFA setup and return Secret Code.
sprint_goal: Establish Cloud Infrastructure & Core Security Foundation
acceptance_criteria: Returns Secret Code for QR; Authenticated access only
definition_of_done: Manual test with Authenticator App verified
